creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
Comparing to version 0.94, the 1.0 version of quagga on FreeBSD fails to advertise routes.  At first I thought it was only failing to advertise routes to my upstream, but it also fails to advertise iBGP routes (to internal peers).

Obviously an enormous show stopper and regression.

Might want to slap a BROKEN on the port until this is fixed.  People upgrading could be in for quite a shock.

(and generally, if bgp is failing, further work with the interwebs is problematic)...
